metadata.description: Modality-based Claude Code skills that recalibrate agents toward compiler-grade craft and scope discipline.

plugins.name: safer-by-default
plugins.description: 13 skills (orchestrate, spec, architect, implement-{junior,senior,staff}, investigate, spike, research, review-senior, verify, typescript, setup) plus 10 bin/ utilities. Composes with eslint-plugin-agent-code-guard (lint floor) and zapbot (publish).
